title: Locked Villager Trades
description:
No more villager trade re-rolling.
Allows players to choose the first villager trade offer from a per-profession fixed set of trades.
body:
## Locked Villager Trades 
(and easy villager trade rerolling)

This mod aims to fix the villager trade offer rerolling mechanic while also providing users an easier rerolling workflow so we can all stop breaking lecterns lol.

A Fabric mod that lets you choose a villager’s initial trade from a list of STATIC trade sets. Meaning even if you break the workstation and replace it, you will still only have the predefined set to choose from. 

The number of trade options available to the player is configurable, so if you want to exploit this mod for easier rerolling, you can.
